_comment: What the agent checks each run. Edit freely.
_pr_scopes_comment: Three concentric PR scopes. Mechanical = blind autofix (sitemap, robots). Metadata = small, scoped React component edits (canonical, JSON-LD, og:url, meta description trimming). Content = title/description rewrites for striking-distance keywords. Anything outside these three scopes must be raised in the GitHub issue, never PR'd.

metadata_pr_allowed_changes: Add or modify <link rel="canonical"> on a marketing page
Add or modify JSON-LD structured data (Organization / SoftwareApplication / WebPage / FAQPage / BreadcrumbList) on a marketing page
Add or modify og:url meta tag
Trim a meta description that is over 165 characters to <=160 characters preserving meaning
Add or modify meta robots tag (only to add or remove noindex, never to change index/noindex on the live marketing routes)
metadata_pr_forbidden: Modify route titles or H1 text (those are content_pr scope)
Modify hero copy, body copy, CTAs
Touch any file under src/pages/admin/, src/pages/internal/, or src/contexts/

indexnow._comment: Public verification key. Submitted with every URL push to api.indexnow.org. Verified by Bing/Yandex/Naver fetching https://<host>/<key>.txt. Public by design — not a secret.
